title: gutierrezia texana var. glutinosa
intro: Gutierrezia texana var. glutinosa, commonly known as Sticky Snakeweed, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gutierrezia texana var. glutinosa include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, while also providing relief from fever and pain. In herbal preparations, Gutierrezia texana var. glutinosa is often used in teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
